sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الطِّفْلُ وَحَمِدَ اللَّهَ بَعْدَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je jelo i zahvalilo Allahu nakon hrane.
sentences.translationEn: The child ate and thanked God after the meal.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ أَبُوهُ: لِمَاذَا تَقُولُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ؟
sentences.translation: Otac ga je upitao: Zašto kaži Elhamdulillah?
sentences.translationEn: His father asked him: Why do you say Alhamdulillah?

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطِّفْلُ: لِأَنَّ اللَّهَ أَعْطَانَا الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je reklo: Jer nam je Allah dao hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The child said: Because God gave us the food.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَ الْأَبُ وَقَالَ: أَحْسَنْتَ يَا بُنَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Otac se nasmiješio i rekao: Bravo, sinčiću moj.
sentences.translationEn: The father smiled and said: Well done my son.
